race.comment: The well-related NORTH POLE (5) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed Global Quest) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this nature. Tuned up for this with a recent trial placing and a strong showing while fresh would not surprise. GRINZINGER KNIGHT (4) has won around this circuit, gets 3kg off with the claim and draws the inside alley. Ticks a few boxes. EL PENSADOR (13) has placed over this track and trip and will be cherry-ripe now fourth run back. In the mix. BEAUX RUMBLE (3) was among the placings last time when third at this track and will be fitter again. Each-way chance.
